name: angular-example-app
description: Angular Example App is a beginner-friendly, production-ready web application built with Angular 21. It serves as a real-world example showcasing core Angular features such as CRUD operations, authentication, i18n, lazy loading, and signals.
description_ja: Angular Example Appは、Angular 21で構築された初心者向けの本番対応Webアプリケーションです。CRUD操作、認証、i18n、遅延読み込み、シグナルなどAngularのコア機能を実例で紹介します。
